deploy.startCommand: node -e "if(!process.env.DATABASE_URL){console.error('ERROR: DATABASE_URL not set. Add a PostgreSQL service and link it.');process.exit(1)};if(!process.env.JWT_SECRET){console.error('ERROR: JWT_SECRET not set. Add it in Railway environment variables.');process.exit(1)}" && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:patch && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && node dist/src/main.js
